title: Dungeon Warfare - FUN RPG
description: An RPG-style modpack, based on dungeons and firearms!
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/DUNGEON_WARFARE/DUNGEON_WARFARE_Header.webp) Dungeon Warfare is a modpack with two main themes, Dungeons and Firearms. This will make the combat in the modpack completely different, and a lot more fun, although it is not something for everyone. Of course, the dungeons will be full of new and powerful enemies, but really, the only way to kill them will be with these firearms - and beware, some enemies will have guns too! ### **Ready to play with your friends on the best hosting?**

I recommend **[Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** for playing with friends because of their high-quality, lag-free servers. You can install any CurseForge modpack or your custom mods without errors. Plus, their support is available 24/7 to help with any issues. Use my code **[to get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** on your purchase. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/DUNGEON_WARFARE/DUNGEON_WARFARE_Description.webp) Playing this modpack takes you into a completely different Minecraft world, everything is much wilder, even nature will challenge you, but one of the most surprising features is the inclusion of firearms. You will have to use them if you want to survive and advance in the game. - Discover lots of amazing new vanilla-style biomes with the Terralith and Geophilic mods! - You'll be able to make use of firearms, with the Just Enough Guns mod as the main base, and additional additions such as Mo' Than Enough Guns - Aurora's Arsenal has also been added! - Face powerful enemies, and discover breathtaking locations with L_Ender's Cataclysm, Dungeon Now Loading, Stalwart Dungeons or Dungeon Crawl, among others. - Many other mods have also been added, with different themes, such as animals, decoration, and much more. - And it's an ideal modpack to play with friends, make use of the new Security Craft blocks, use new animations with EmoteCraft, or revive your companions, with PlayerRevive! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/DUNGEON_WARFARE/DUNGEON_WARFARE_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jcjpcmyT/images/548c11aa499e6c1babe473e82e1470f4c6bfa88f.png) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jcjpcmyT/images/97085a4327a437317ba7229d8074ed1159f61af7.png) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jcjpcmyT/images/b88594b2c266b5633a913bd18dff5bfc85f34b97.png)
